text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I lost again... What should I do? I'm... I'm...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It feels like my engines are on fire!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I thought I could win, but I couldn't! My heart is
pounding so fast it just might explode!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I got it! We should start training, like, right now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But my engines are ready! I can take off at any
moment now!
choice_data_list:
Taking off too abruptly is how you stall an
engine.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh! You're totally right! I'd crash if that
happened!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Mayday, mayday! Engine maintenance required
before takeoff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Mayano Top Gun and I start training
for the next race.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! ☆ Now that's the Trainer I know and love!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: All right! Time to get serious!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna do some aerobatics, so make sure you
hold on tight. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Mayano Top Gun gives training
her all. It looks like she really does want to
improve!
